comments.comment: Changes in emissions are mainly from  ponds releases. Please note that the sum of speciated vocs is more than the total VOC emissions reported for individual stacks greater than 5 m . This is due to the difference in emission factors used for calculating the emissions. While speciated voc emissions for natural gas combustion is calculated based on the new 2015 CEPEI EFs the total voc emission is calculated based on the old US EPA AP 42 emissions factor which is an order of magnitude lower than the individual emissions.

comments.comment: Changes in emissions are mainly from  ponds releases. Please note that the sum of speciated vocs is more than the total VOC emissions reported for individual stacks greater than 5 m . This is due to the difference in emission factors used for calculating the emissions. While speciated voc emissions for natural gas combustion is calculated based on the new 2015 CEPEI EFs the total voc emission is calculated based on the old US EPA AP 42 emissions factor which is an order of magnitude lower than the individual emissions.

comments.comment: Variation in fugitive emissions - In 2022, the fugitive area emissions measurement campaign used lower detection limits than used in 2021. However, the PAH substances were still undetectable. NPRI guidance requires to use half DL to estimate emissions for non-detects. 2022 emissions are much lower when compared to 2021 emissions estimated with higher DL.
